query: Hey, I just built a podman image from my Dockerfile and want to check it for CVEs before pushing to the registry. Can you scan it?
Run trivy on my project filesystem to find vulnerabilities in our npm dependencies
Can you check our Kubernetes deployment YAMLs for security misconfigurations?
I need to generate an SBOM for our Node.js project for our SOC 2 audit. Can you help?
Scan this container image for vulnerabilities with severity critical and high only
Check if any of our Go dependencies have known CVEs using trivy
Run a full security audit on our project — check lockfiles, IaC misconfigs, and secrets with trivy
We need to add vulnerability scanning to our CI pipeline. Can you show me how to run trivy in podman with exit-code 1?
I want to scan our Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml for misconfigurations

Scan my git history for accidentally committed API keys and passwords
Check for hardcoded secrets in our source code
Run npm audit on our project to check for dependency vulnerabilities
